svg.text: Simulated endpoint distributions and observed endpoints, by condition group
Each column is one condition cell (organism x judge x format x pool). Light-blue shape = distribution of simulated final-round values pooled over the cell's runs.
Dark dots = the observed final value of each real run (one dot per run/seed). y = value on the 0-1 scale.
simulated final-round value (300 draws per run, pooled over the cell)
